headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal Weight Rating on Assurant (AIZ)
summary: Assurant Inc. (NYSE:AIZ) is one of the 7 best property & casualty insurance stocks to buy right now. As of the April 6 closing, consensus sentiment for Assurant Inc. (NYSE:AIZ) remained strongly bullish. The stock received coverage from 5 analysts, 4 of whom assigned Buy ratings and 1 gave a Hold call. With no Sell […]
